caption: A man with short dark hair, wearing a light-colored button-down shirt and black over-ear headphones with a microphone, speaks while gesturing with his hands. He is positioned against a plain, light-colored background. The text "Ashish Raichur" appears in the bottom-left corner of each scene. Initially, the man holds his hands up and open, moving them as he speaks. He then widens his gesture, bringing his hands further apart. As the sequence progresses, he lowers his hands, eventually bringing them together in front of his chest, where he clenches his right hand into a light fist. His facial expression remains focused and engaged throughout the movements, with his mouth open as he speaks.
